message:
test(fuzz): extend fuzz_groupby_sum corpus with 15 structured seeds

Add 15 new fuzz corpus seeds for groupby_sum targeting edge cases:
- all_null_keys: keys with all null values
- all_null_values: values with all null scalars
- single_key_multi_value: one key grouping multiple values
- multi_key_single_value: multiple keys each with one value
- negative_values: negative integers in value series
- mixed_int_float: combination of int64 and float64 values
- many_unique_keys: 6 distinct key values
- same_key_repeated: all entries share one key
- alternating_keys: key pattern 0,1,0,1,...
- float_edge_values: boundary float representations
- zero_sum_group: values that sum to zero
- empty_keys: no key bytes before separator
- empty_values: no value bytes after separator
- boundary_key_modulo: key tags at modulo boundaries
- dropna_true_with_nulls: dropna=true with null entries

Each seed has a corresponding unit test validating invariant satisfaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
